subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the establishment of proof and evidence! Thy letter hath arrived, and Jinab-i-Aqa Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لاقامه الحجه و البرهان نامه آنحضرت وصول یافت و جناب آقا محمد
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @review of publications
